actions.value:
The Edge app was temporarily removed from the UK app stores due to the new FCA regulations. We've worked with a legal team and just finished making the required changes for the app to become compliant these new laws, and re-enabled in the UK region!
 

If you still do not find 'Edge - Bitcoin & Crypto Wallet' app listed in your app store, yet:

  • Android users may always download the latest version of the Edge .apk directly from our website - https://edge.app/uk
  • iPhone users, we expect the app to be live in Apple Appstore very soon, please allow a bit more time for the government to process our request.
  • Any users who have Edge installed on their device already, may continue using the app as normal, but won’t be able to re-install or update Edge while located in UK, until the UK version of the app is fully approved.

 

Please let us know if you have any questions or concerns, we are here to help.
